ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT(ISNEW()), NOW() > (CreatedDate + (1/1440)), RecordType.DeveloperName = "Solution_Engineering", $User.Id = Requester__r.Id ,NOT(ISPICKVAL(Opportunity__r.StageName,'Closed Lost')), OR( Requester__c <> Recipient__c ,
AND( ISCHANGED(Recipient_Picklist__c), (Requester__r.FirstName & ' ' & Requester__r.LastName) = PRIORVALUE(Recipient_Picklist__c), OR( NOT(ISCHANGED( Recipient_Email__c )), NOT(ISCHANGED( Requester_Email__c )), NOT(ISCHANGED( OwnerId ))) )),
OR( ISCHANGED( Account__c ), ISCHANGED( Opportunity__c ), (ISCHANGED( Status__c ) && NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c,'Cancelled'))) , ISCHANGED( Request_Type__c ), ISCHANGED( Details_of_Deliverable__c ), ISCHANGED( Pain_Point_Use_Case_for_Request__c ), ISCHANGED( Websites__c ), ISCHANGED( Title_Of_Person_People_Meetings_Are_With__c ), ISCHANGED( Excel_Analysis__c ), ISCHANGED( RFP_Written_Submission__c ), ISCHANGED( DI_Feasibility_Test__c ), ISCHANGED( Client_Meeting__c ), ISCHANGED( DI_Pricing_Legal__c ), ISCHANGED( Insight_Email__c ), ISCHANGED( Discovery_Call__c ), ISCHANGED( Deck__c ), ISCHANGED( Proposal__c ), ISCHANGED( Trial_Summary__c ), ISCHANGED( RecordTypeId ), AND( ISCHANGED(Recipient_Picklist__c), OR( (Requester__r.FirstName & ' ' & Requester__r.LastName) = TEXT(Recipient_Picklist__c), (Requester__r.FirstName & ' ' & Requester__r.LastName) <> TEXT(Recipient_Picklist__c) ) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only Additional Information can be edited by requester
